## Problem statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear and concise description
of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]".

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you
have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or mock-ups about the feature request here.
